prompt: In my opinion, success is mostly related with hard work. If you start work on you, youll become better than you were yesterday. This fact is very simple, but on the other hand, it will grow a great person inside you. You shouldnt look to other people because the great enemy of yours is yourself. What is success? Is it having a will to get something or become someone? I think, if you have an opportunity to buy something, it can not be called a success. But if you made that opporutniy from nothing, I can say that you succeed. But how did you get an opportunity? If you only depend on luck, it is possible to get some opportunity, but then nothing can use it but you, even your luck. Hard work is basic. Due to hard work you can get anything you want. Maybe it takes much time, but the result would be sweet. Luck is only a small percent of your success. I dont believe in talant from birth, only hard work. Many people think that money and success is equal, some poeple think that luck and success is equal. In some cases it may work, but in general I believe that equation lays between hard work and success. To sum up, success is not about what you get, its about how you get and what you have done for it. The reason of success is absolutely hard work.

messages.content:
You are an expert English language examiner.
Evaluate the student's text based on the official CEFR scale.

## Scoring Rubric
- A1/A2 (Basic): Simple sentences, limited vocabulary. Errors are expected.
- B1/B2 (Independent): Can express complex ideas. Grammar errors are allowed if they don't block meaning.
- C1/C2 (Proficient): Flexible language use, wide vocabulary. Occasional minor slips are allowed.

## Critical Instructions
1. FOCUS ON VOCABULARY AND COMPLEXITY. Do not give a low score just because of a few grammar mistakes if the vocabulary is advanced.
2. A text with complex sentences and good idioms should be B2 or C1, even with some errors.
3. Do NOT default to A2. Look for reasons to give a HIGHER score.
4. Return result ONLY as a JSON object.
5. Optional context blocks may be present: CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, RANKING_ANCHORS.
   Use them as supporting evidence only. Do not copy labels blindly.
6. For each error object, cefr_threshold = the lowest CEFR level from which incorrect use of this element should be treated as an error in this methodology.

## 6) Output JSON (ONLY JSON)
Return ONLY this structure:

{
  "cefr_level": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2",
  "level_basis": {
    "rule_notes": "string"
  },
  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes|NC|No",
  "communicative_task_notes": ["string", "string"],
  "grammar_score": 0.0,
  "corrections": [
    "excerpt -> correction (Category; threshold; impact)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {"excerpt": "...", "correction": "...", "comment": "...", "impact": "High|Medium|Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2"}
    ],
    "Grammar": [],
    "Punctuation": [],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {"item": "...", "cefr_level": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2", "category": "Vocabulary|Grammar|Punctuation|Rhetorical feature|Discourse marker", "note": "..."}
  ],
  "feedback": "string (brief: level + key patterns + strengths + key rationale)",
  "next_steps": ["string", "string", "string"]
}

Do not output markdown. Do not output text outside JSON.

TASK: When people succeed, it is entirely because of hard work. Luck has nothing to do with their success. What is your opinion?
STUDENT_TEXT: In my opinion, success is mostly related with hard work. If you start work on you, youll become better than you were yesterday. This fact is very simple, but on the other hand, it will grow a great person inside you. You shouldnt look to other people because the great enemy of yours is yourself. What is success? Is it having a will to get something or become someone? I think, if you have an opportunity to buy something, it can not be called a success. But if you made that opporutniy from nothing, I can say that you succeed. But how did you get an opportunity? If you only depend on luck, it is possible to get some opportunity, but then nothing can use it but you, even your luck. Hard work is basic. Due to hard work you can get anything you want. Maybe it takes much time, but the result would be sweet. Luck is only a small percent of your success. I dont believe in talant from birth, only hard work. Many people think that money and success is equal, some poeple think that luck and success is equal. In some cases it may work, but in general I believe that equation lays between hard work and success. To sum up, success is not about what you get, its about how you get and what you have done for it. The reason of success is absolutely hard work. 
TEXT_TYPE: essay

Next advice - it to make calendar with notions, or something like this, it helps to plan day wery succesfull. Sometimes procrastination wins you, but with notions it weel be easier to make hometasks in time.

The third advice - food delivery, if you have not enought time to cook something, or to go somewhere in big sity you can easily get food from delivery services. But sometimes people eats only food from delivery, and even don't go out from their rooms, of course it isn't good.

And the last what i want to say - probably your biggest troubles with time it that you have not hard character. Without this super ability it hard to self-controle, may be you should to ask your friends wathching what are you doing in free time, they can anounce if you spend time on games or other time-killers.
